dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses context-dependent direction with MA50 crossovers. Entry conditions translated as price crossing above/below 50-period SMA with confirmation on next close. Stop loss set to 4.0x ATR equivalent (represented as percentage). Position sizing increase (25%) is a portfolio management parameter outside backtest rule scope. Max drawdown tolerance (25%) is a risk management constraint typically applied at portfolio level. Wide stops and trend-following approach aligned with TRENDING regimes.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses context-dependent direction with MA50 crossovers. Entry conditions translated as price crossing above/below 50-period SMA with confirmation on next close. Stop loss set to 4.0x ATR equivalent (represented as percentage). Position sizing increase (25%) is a portfolio management parameter outside backtest rule scope. Max drawdown tolerance (25%) is a risk management constraint typically applied at portfolio level. Wide stops and trend-following approach aligned with TRENDING regimes.

source_rule_text: A trader should use very long-term decision-making systems with wide stops to filter out market noise and catch larger trends, accepting that this requires tolerance for large retracements.
